howToPlay.title: HOW TO PLAY
steps: Type words using the letters on the wheel.
Submit words to cast spells at the enemy.
Longer words deal significantly more damage!
Defeat the enemy to progress to the next stage.

entries.name: Ultimate Power
entries.description: Fill the circular gauge by landing attacks. At 100%, your next word deals 2x damage!

entries.name: Mana (MP)
entries.description: Used for special letter effects. It regenerates slowly over time.

entries.name: Shields
entries.description: They absorb damage before your HP is touched.

elementalLetters.title: SPECIAL LETTERS
elementalLetters.fire: Deals more damage(Bonus damage when used as first letter).
elementalLetters.heal: Restores a small amount of HP based on word length.
elementalLetters.shield: Adds a temporary protection layer to your hearts.
